text: Which one of the listed requirements regarding the launching and recovery arrangements for survival craft corresponds to present Solas regulations?

options.text: The operator on deck cannot see the craft during lowering
Launching and recovery arrangements shall be such that the operator at all times observes the survival craft and lifeboats
Only manual hand-cranks can be used for lowering
Launching must take at least 1 hour

explanation: Launching and recovery systems must be designed so that the operator in charge of the launching procedure has a clear view of the survival craft throughout the entire process to maintain safety.
